title: Better Foliage Add-on
description: A Pack that enhances the models of lily pads and vines and make flowers look 3D in hand.
body:
# Better Foliage Add-on > A Pack that enhances the models of lily pads and vines and make flowers look 3D in hand. # 📝Features - Improves the model and the texture of the Vines - Makes Lilypads 3D with 8 variants including 7 with flowers - Changes the display of the flowers to see them "3D" in hand
🍀Lilypads ### Lilypads will randomly have the flowers of the following colors * Light Blue * Magenta * Orange * Pink * Red * White
🌼3D Flowers in hand * Allium * Azure bluet * Blue orchid * Cornflower * Dandelion * Lily of the valley * Tulip _(pink, white, red and orange)_ * Oxeye daisy * Wither rose * Torchflowe * Eyeblossom (_closed and open_)
## 🔗External links
